summary: Session 39 — Ghost Engine (8 modules) + VIP gating + Cosmic Replay slider + 'How to Use' free-user rewrite fully validated end-to-end. 15/15 backend pytest cases PASS on /api/ghost-ledger/{date}/{mode} for both Swiss (13.05.2026) and Euro (15.05.2026) modes: top-level keys present (arithmetic_ledger, alive_ghosts, chainless_windows, saturation, quarter_shape, carrier_pool, convergence), shout/whisper ranges respect mode bounds (Swiss 1-42, Euro 1-50), ghost births non-zero, invalid mode/date return 200+{error} (existing pattern), lookback param respected, regressions on /api/cosmic-voices + /api/ghost-counter intact. Frontend Playwright run: free user sees vip-deep-tools-teaser and ALL deep panels hidden (dj-we-think-that-box, cosmic-voices-panel, ghost-engine-panel, ghost-ledger-panel, cosmic-brain-panel = False); after promo 93928 the teaser disappears and all 4 deep panels appear; Ghost Engine expanded, target=13.05.2026, run produced shout [2,5,6,7,17,26,...], alive ghost list with born_door labels (P1+P2=?, P1+?=P3, etc.); Cosmic Replay slider builds 31-date timeline (28.01.2026 → 13.05.2026) and moving it to mid-point updated the target-date input to 21.03.2026 and re-fetched Ghost Engine; Euro mode switch + run 15.05.2026 produced a different shout set (1,5,3,9,11,20,23,...); 'How to Use' guide contains both '🎫 Where to start (Free)' and '🎻 Deep listening tools (Reserved)' sections referencing Pending Tickets.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 with {error: ...} instead of 4xx (pre-existing convention across Lucky Jack endpoints; non-blocking).

passed_tests: FE: VIP unlock with promo 93928 → teaser hidden, all 4 deep panels visible
FE: ghost-engine-toggle expands content; run-btn produces ghost-engine-output with shout/whisper/alive list
FE: cosmic-replay-toggle builds timeline (31 dates), replay-slider move updates target-date + refetches
FE: Euro mode switch + run produces different shout numbers (different draws_window)
FE: How-to-Use modal contains '🎫 Where to start (Free)' + '🎻 Deep listening tools (Reserved)' + Pending Tickets reference
critical_code_review_comments: Ghost engine orchestrator correctly fuses 8 modules and returns a clean, well-typed payload (no Mongo _id leakage).
Convergence scoring is deterministic and bounded (shout ≥ 5 pts, whisper 3–4 pts, capped at 12 each).
Cosmic Replay onMouseUp/onTouchEnd refetch is good UX; onChange-only would be excessive. Consider adding 'onKeyUp' for keyboard accessibility (minor).
App.js is now ~6108 lines — pre-existing technical debt flagged in earlier iterations remains. Future refactor candidate (move Ghost Engine tile to its own component, ~250 lines extractable).

Backend endpoint pattern of returning 200+{error} instead of 4xx is consistent across Lucky Jack APIs; clients handle it correctly. Non-blocking, but consider normalising in a future API hardening pass.
VIP gating is symmetric: !isUnlimited shows teaser, isUnlimited shows all 4 deep panels. Clean and matches the canon described in the request.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_session39_ghost_engine.py (new — 15 pytest cases for Ghost Engine endpoint + regressions)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (free + VIP + Ghost Engine + Replay + Euro + How-to-Use all verified)
